---
title: "Research"
format: html
editor: visual
---

My work intersects psychiatry, genomics, and sociology to better understand mental health.

**I lead three programs of research:**

## Social connection and mental health

To understand how social experiences link to mental health from childhood to adulthood.

::: paper-row
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/jcv2.12073"> <img src="images/JCPPA.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jaacop.2023.02.001"> <img src="images/JAACAPO.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00787-024-02573-w"> <img src="images/ECAP.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>
:::

## Depression symptoms

To quantify how experiences across the life span contribute to depression symptoms using innovative statistical approaches to integrate large-scale longitudinal data.

::: paper-row
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/da.23213"> <img src="images/D&amp;A.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ssmph.2025.101886"> <img src="images/SSM.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/wf52a_v1"> <img src="images/SPPE.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>
:::

## Genetics and society

To demonstrate how genetic findings and teachings must be embedded within societal context.

<p style="text-align: center;">

<a href="https://www.wedowlab.com/humane-genetics-curriculum-hgc"> <img src="images/HGC.png" width="200px"/><br> Humane Genetics Curriculum </a>

</p>

::: paper-row
<a href="https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/j5drc_v1"> <img src="images/Science.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10519-026-10251-7"> <img src="images/BG.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xhgg.2025.100548"> <img src="images/HGG.png" class="paper-img"/> </a>
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------
